commands.review_summary:
The PR routes explicit-model `infer image describe` and `describe-many` through the existing image model fallback runner, reports failed fallback attempts in JSON, and adds a regression test for primary 429 then fallback success.

PR surface: Source +17, Tests +64. Total +81 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Source inspection gives a clear current-main path: explicit image `--model` calls `describeImageFileWithModel` directly and never reaches `runWithImageModelFallback`; the linked trajectory supplies the 429 symptom, but I did not run a live OpenRouter repro.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The PR needs maintainer handling because it has a protected label, changes documented provider/model fallback behavior, lacks real behavior proof, and currently fails lint; no ClawSweeper repair lane should be requested while contributor proof is missing.

target.title: fix: retry image describe fallback models
target.body:
Related: #98264

## What Problem This Solves

Fixes an issue where users running `openclaw infer image describe` or `describe-many` with an explicit configured image model could lose the configured fallback recovery path when the primary provider/model failed, such as an upstream 429 from an image model route.

## Why This Change Was Made

The CLI explicit-model image describe path now reuses OpenClaw's existing image model fallback runner. It tries the requested `--model` first, then walks `agents.defaults.imageModel.fallbacks` before failing, and reports failed attempts in the JSON `attempts` field. This intentionally addresses the reported CLI/tool-wrapper path without adding a broad fail-closed skill contract system.

## User Impact

Users and skills that call `openclaw infer image describe` or `describe-many --model <provider/model> --json` can expect configured image fallback models to be attempted automatically after provider/model failures. The JSON output also exposes the failed primary attempt for easier diagnosis.

## Evidence

AI-assisted with Codex.

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/capability-cli.test.ts` passed: 1 file, 105 tests.
- `pnpm tsgo:test:src` passed.
- `git diff --check` passed.

The new regression test simulates `openrouter/google/gemma-4-31b-it:free` failing with an upstream 429, then verifies `openrouter/google/gemma-4-31b-it` is attempted and the failed primary attempt is included in CLI JSON output.
target.author: momothemage
